title: Primitive Blast Furnace
discoveryHint: Reach the steam age to see this page.

sections.text: The Primitive Blast Furnace is your first big project. It turns Iron into Steel by combining it with a carbon source like Coal or Charcoal. The process is slow but essential, as Steel is required for almost everything beyond the bronze age.
Steel is significantly tougher than Iron or Wrought Iron. It opens up High Pressure Steam machines, the Coke Oven, and eventually the path to electric machines.
